KeysToEntries.Message2: Sorry, it’s morning. You have to get up!
KeysToEntries.Message3: Birdsong wakes you from your slumber.
KeysToEntries.Message1: Darkness is banished by the dawn.
KeysToEntries.Message6: A new day means new possibilities.
KeysToEntries.Message7: Turns out you’re not dead. So, get to work!
KeysToEntries.Message8: Get up! Those dragons aren’t going to slay themselves!
KeysToEntries.Message9: The gods gift you another sunrise.
